name: harness-design-kit
description: Local runtime plugin for planner-generator-evaluator harness design in long-running application development and frontend iteration

interface.longDescription: A local runtime plugin inspired by Anthropic's harness design article. It packages planner, generator, and evaluator roles; sprint and continuous build profiles; frontend design scoring; file-based handoffs; stateful phase transitions; Playwright-backed live QA hooks; and reset-vs-compaction guidance for Codex and Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Use Harness Design Kit to turn this short app idea into a product spec, sprint contracts, and an evaluator-driven build loop.
Run a frontend design loop with scoring for design quality, originality, craft, and functionality.
Decide whether this long task should stay on compaction or switch to an explicit context reset handoff.
Use the local runtime commands to validate state, advance phases, and prepare handoffs.
